title: Healthcare SaaS overlap mapping
arguments: US healthcare SaaS with EU users, handling PHI and personal data. Need SOC2 Type II and HIPAA readiness, with GDPR obligations. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US,EU --industry healthcare-saas --strict-facts

title: SaaS privacy overlap mapping
arguments: Global SaaS requiring SOC2 with EU and California customer data obligations. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU,US_CA --industry saas --strict-facts

title: Payments platform overlap mapping
arguments: E-commerce payments platform with EU customers requiring PCI DSS and SOC2, plus GDPR obligations. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU,US --industry ecommerce-payments --strict-facts

title: Fintech overlap with DORA and privacy
arguments: EU fintech provider needs unified controls across DORA, GDPR, and SOC2 without duplicating implementation work across teams. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions EU --industry fintech --strict-facts

title: Healthcare payments overlap mapping
arguments: US healthcare payments SaaS processes PHI and cardholder data for EU users and needs one integrated control architecture. --as-of 2026-02-15 --jurisdictions US,EU --industry healthcare-payments --strict-facts
